claims.summary: Pressure trend smoothing should be a continuous/graded high-entropy curve rather than a static jump.
claims.rationale: Focused WS tests verify an entropy handoff band and graded smoothing ballast without a static window jump.

claims.summary: A low-energy reciprocity heartbeat could anchor legacy bidirectional observation when distinguishability loss rises.
claims.rationale: Adding heartbeat behavior would alter live cadence/connection semantics and needs explicit operator approval; current work only verified existing heartbeat-delta diagnostics.
